synopsis: "Blade Squadron: Zero Hour" is a short story by David J. Williams and Mark S. Williams, with art by Chris Trevas. The story, published in Star Wars Insider 160, is a sequel to the short story "Blade Squadron" and a tie-in prequel to the novel Aftermath. It takes place after the Battle of Endor,focusing on the squadron's exploits during the Battle of Malastare. Their objective was to destroy the planet's shield generator and communications hub; however, Gina Moonsong disobeyed orders and also destroyed Moff Valco Pandion's vacation palace.
title: Blade Squadron: Zero Hour
